Asset.Partner_Subscription__c where QuoteLineItem.Partner_Subscription__c EQUALS TRUE should NOT be created as Asset Records. They should ONLY show up in the Partner Subscription related list on the Contract record with the following information:
- Partner Subscription Name
- Product Name
- Quantity
- Opportunity
- Quote
- Quote Line Item
- Order
- Order Item
- Contract
- Asset

Do_Not_Sync__c MUST be checked for these Assets
